creator: jswink@pacbell.net
text:
panic occurs when booting using the kern and mfsroot floppies:

atapci0: <RZ 100? ATA controller !WARNING! buggy chip data loss possible> port 0x3f4-0x3f7, 0
x1f0-0x1f7 irq 0 at device 15.0 on pci0
atapci0: Bus mastering DMA not supported
panic: resource_list_alloc: resource entry is busy

How-To-Repeat: Boot with kern & mfsroot floppies on system afflicted with RZ 1000 ATA chipset.
